[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2016-05-11
[TITLE]: Berkeley County School Board seeks legal counsel on transgender bathroom debate
[METADATA/INTRO]: Berkeley County School Board seeks legal counsel on transgender bathroom debate MONCKS CORNER, S.C. (WCIV) — The Berkeley County School Board decided Tuesday night it would continue to allow transgender students to use the bathroom with which they identify on...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: "I identify as a girl," she explained. "I was born biologically male but I identify as Sera Guerry, a 16 year old girl." 
 Guerry said when she found out last month Berkeley High School was going to be open to transgender bathroom use, she was excited. She said it was one of the happiest days of her life. 
 She said she suffered from undue stress and angst prior to the decision. 
 "Needless to say I have suffered greatly from these restrictions both mentally and socially," she said before a room of hundreds at Tuesday's Berkeley County School Board meeting. 
 Cole Dowd, a senior at Berkeley Middle College High School, also spoke on behalf of transgender teens.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2024
[TITLE]: Garfield students walk out to protest Akron Public Schools' layoffs
[METADATA/INTRO]: 'We love these teachers': Students walk out to protest Akron Public Schools' layoffs Students at Garfield Community Learning Center walked out of school Monday afternoon to protest plans by Akron Public Schools to lay off teachers and other staff....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Fifteen minutes before the final bell rang on Monday, Garfield students headed toward the gymnasium and sat in the bleachers. Many held up signs saying, “save our teachers'' and screams were heard throughout the gym of different teachers' names. 
 Six student organizers gave speeches, saying it was unfair for their favorite teachers to be left without jobs on such short notice. 
 Megan Oyster, a teacher impacted by the upcoming layoffs, said she is very disappointed. 
 Oyster, an 11th grade English Language Arts, teacher, started teaching at Garfield in October. 
 Although the news comes as a surprise for her, she said she was very happy and proud that her students stuck up for her during the rally.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021
[TITLE]: Moms for Liberty rally
[METADATA/INTRO]: NEWSMoms for Liberty rally at school board meeting Malcolm DenemarkFLORIDA TODAYMay 11, 2021, 7:34 p.m. ETThe Moms for Liberty held an anti mask rally before the Tuesday night school board meeting, asking the school board to drop the mask mandate....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: NEWSMoms for Liberty rally at school board meeting Malcolm DenemarkFLORIDA TODAYMay 11, 2021, 7:34 p.m. ETThe Moms for Liberty held an anti mask rally before the Tuesday night school board meeting, asking the school board to drop the mask mandate.
